title: TrackGuard
description: A real-time smart access control and intrusion detection system. Integrated ESP32 hardware and RFID readers with a secure backend to stream security alerts via WebSockets.
impact: Real-time threat detection, reducing response time by 60%

title: VibeTDU ChemLab
description: An interactive web-based virtual chemistry laboratory simulator. Leveraged HTML5 Canvas for real-time visualization of chemical reactions and physics rendering.

title: MissLost
description: A campus-wide portal for lost and found items. Powered by real-time updates and secure verification workflows to connect owners and finders quickly.
impact: Connected hundreds of students to recover lost assets

title: CV-Agent
description: An AI-driven resume rating and parsing platform. Uses LLMs for document evaluation from a recruiter's perspective, offering actionable suggestions for ATS score optimization.
impact: Automated resume analysis, reducing screening time by 80%
